selected_issue.title: Add canonical machine-readable promotion report template and policy wiring

why_it_outranked_alternatives: No unresolved rank 1-4 issues were evidenced in this run (structural invariants, failing canonical tests, replay mismatches, or high-frequency diagnostic failures). The highest unresolved issue was rank 5: missing instrumentation, specifically absence of machine-readable promotion reports required by Chapter 11.

files_changed.change: Require both markdown and JSON promotion report artifacts.
Document both markdown and JSON report outputs.
Add human-readable report for this run.
Add machine-readable report for this run.

before_after_evidence.before: Reports were markdown-only and automation/reports contained 0 JSON report artifacts.
before_after_evidence.after: A canonical JSON template and a run JSON report artifact now exist, and policy/docs require both markdown and JSON reports.

unresolved_risks: Historical markdown-only reports were not backfilled.
Downstream automated consumers may still need integration work.
stop_reason: Selected rank-5 instrumentation issue fixed with minimal bounded changes; further work would expand scope.
